title:
Pay for the service,
not the software.
subtitle: The code is open source. Deploy it yourself for free, or let us manage it for you.
service_desc_free: Access without sign-up or credit card. Explore the platform with no commitment.
service_desc_starter: Create a free account and join groups. Perfect for collaborating at no cost.
service_desc_dev: Managed infrastructure for a single user. The license is personal and cannot be transferred to another person.
service_desc_biz: The admin manages the team and assigns licenses from the admin panel. The per-license price decreases with volume.
service_desc_ent: Annual contract with unlimited licenses and discounts on consulting and training.
svc_discounts_training: Discounts on training and specialised consulting
pm_title: Calculate your best plan and budget
pm_subtitle: Move the slider to find the right plan for your team
pm_open_btn: Calculate your best plan and budget
calc_subtitle: Price per license decreases with volume down to 50% of a Developer license (€4.50/lic).
calc_ent_note: Minimum price €4.50/lic. Final price negotiated based on volume and contract.
calc_sh_info: Greater data security: your information is encapsulated in your own environment, with no third-party access. Includes guaranteed SLA by contract.
contact_success: Request sent. We'll get in touch shortly.
contact_error: Failed to send. Please try again.
scale_subtitle: The per-license price decreases automatically as your team grows. The annual plan locks the price for 12 months.
scale_packs_desc: If you have an annual plan and need more licenses during the year, you can buy packs of 5 or 10 licenses at the same per-license price you agreed to when signing up, prorated for the remaining months.
scale_ent_desc: Price is negotiated based on total license volume. Minimum price €5 / license / month. Annual contract required.
consulting_desc: In-person or online sessions tailored to your team. Price based on type and duration, negotiated directly.
extra_sh_desc: Your infrastructure, your control. Includes guaranteed SLA by contract.
extra_sh_hint: Add it in the plan calculator
extra_training_desc: In-person or online sessions tailored to your team and level.
extra_consulting_desc: Personalised guidance to get the most out of the platform.
oss_desc: iAgentsHub is open source. Download it, deploy it on your server and use it at no platform cost. What our paid plans offer is managed service, support and a direct relationship.
addon_title: Self-Hosted · Business and Enterprise only · annual contract
addon_desc: Deploy on your own infrastructure with support included. Exclusive to Business and Enterprise plans. Requires annual contract — not available on monthly billing.
addon_note: Enterprise includes self-hosted in the negotiated contract
addon_includes: Docker on your infra · SSO / SAML · Audit log · License management · Support included
byok_note: All plans use your own API keys — we never pay LLM inference for you. AI costs remain entirely under your control.
faq1_q: Can I use iAgentsHub without paying?
faq1_a: Yes, in two ways: the Free plan on our cloud, or by deploying the open source version on your own server. Self-hosted has no platform cost and no feature restrictions.
faq2_q: What do I get in paid plans that I don't have in self-hosted?
faq2_a: Managed service: we handle infrastructure, backups, updates and availability. And support: direct access with guaranteed response times and, in Enterprise, a contract with SLA.
faq3_q: How does the Business pricing scale work?
faq3_a: The per-license price decreases automatically as you add more users. On monthly billing the adjustment is immediate. On annual billing you lock in the price for your contracted volume for 12 months and can buy additional packs of 5 or 10 licenses at the same unit price, prorated.
faq4_q: Can I transfer the Soldier license to someone else?
faq4_a: No. The Soldier license is strictly personal and non-transferable. It is tied to a single account and cannot be assigned, shared or used by more than one person.
faq5_a: You pay for 10 months and get access for 12 — equivalent to a 17% discount. The invoice is issued once a year for the full amount. The per-license price is locked for the entire duration of the contract.
